Employee Name: [PERSON]
Employee ID: [EMPLOYEE_ID]
Email Address: [EMAIL_ADDRESS]
Department: Engineering
Manager Name: [PERSON]
Salary Band: [SALARY]

Review Period: [DATE_TIME], [DATE_TIME], 2023
Competency Ratings: 
Technical Expertise: 4
Problem Solving: 5
Collaboration: 4
Communication: 3

[PERSON] has made significant contributions to the engineering team during the review period. Her technical expertise and problem-solving skills have been impressive, and she has consistently delivered high-quality results on her projects. She has worked effectively with cross-functional teams to resolve complex technical issues and has demonstrated a strong ability to analyze problems and develop creative solutions. One area for improvement is in her communication skills, where she sometimes struggles to articulate complex technical ideas to non-technical stakeholders.

To continue growing as a technical leader, [PERSON] should focus on developing her communication skills, both written and verbal. She should work on simplifying her technical explanations and providing regular updates to stakeholders. Additionally, [PERSON] has been identified as a candidate for a mentorship program to help her develop her leadership skills and prepare for future roles within the company. Overall, [PERSON]'s performance has been strong, and with some targeted development, she has the potential to take on even more challenging and complex projects in the future. With her excellent problem-solving skills and strong technical expertise, [PERSON] is a valuable asset to the engineering team, and her contributions are highly valued.
